summary: Phase 1 skeleton E2E testing complete. All 14 backend pytest cases pass (100%) covering root/health, seeded NCEC limits (14 rows, idempotent), full campaign CRUD, CSV+XLSX upload with default & aliased headers, bad-row error handling, unsupported file rejection, missing-timestamp 400, reading flag toggle + valid_only filter, clear-readings status reset, campaign cascade delete, and upload logs reverse-chronological ordering. Frontend Playwright covered root->/campaigns redirect, nav, NCEC limits table (14 rows), campaign create form, tabs (Overview/Readings/Settings), wind-rose bin add+save, upload via file input (3 rows ingested), readings table + flag toggle, and delete-campaign confirmation flow. No blockers found.
critical_code_review_comments: Cosmetic: routes/readings.py imports `from_mongo` but never uses it — safe to drop.
Robustness: readings.py catches BLE001 broad Exception per row, which is intentional for ingest; consider narrowing to ValueError/pd.errors when Phase 2 introduces stricter validation.
Minor: LimitsPage shows a 'Loading limits…' state — was correctly observed and gated behind the table testid. No fix needed.
seed_data_creation: Test campaigns are prefixed TEST_ and auto-deleted by fixture teardown. 14 NCEC pollutant limits seeded once by backend startup and remain (idempotent).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1 is stable. When Phase 2 adds calculation engine/report generation, extend backend_test.py accordingly. Backend runs at REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL/api. Openpyxl is available for XLSX generation. Column aliases (Timestamp, PM2.5, Wind Speed, Relative Humidity, Barometric Pressure) confirmed working.
